matchStrings: renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) packageName=(?<packageName>\S+) depName=(?<depName>\S+)\s+public const string \w+Image = \"[^:\"]+:(?<currentValue>[^\"@]+)@(?<currentDigest>sha256:[a-f0-9]+)\";

packageRules.description: Keep the compatibility lane on Kafka 4.0.x
Keep the current-stable Kafka lane digest-pinned
